claim.observation: Trusted MFT/USN extraction summary records EWF-derived $MFT and $UsnJrnl:$J binaries plus MFTECmd CSV outputs. $MFT is 325,320,704 bytes with SHA256 719d3220..., $UsnJrnl:$J is 2,665,094,304 bytes with SHA256 af296415..., MFT CSV is 188,373,476 bytes, and USN CSV is 58,044,743 bytes.
claim.interpretation: This establishes the read-only filesystem-metadata inputs and parser outputs used for the target-window filesystem-journal check.
